subject: A kneeling figure at the edge of a still body of water, cupping water to drink from their hands; ghostly mounted riders recede in the distant background
description: A robed kneeling figure leans over the edge of a glassy still pool, cupping water to drink from their hands. The water and the figure dissolve into one another in luminous pale-blue and silver tones, as if the figure is partly made of the water they sip. In the misty background, ghostly riders on horseback move through a blue haze across what appears to be a vast plain or shoreline. Light is cool and diffuse, with a dreamlike, memory-soaked quality. The whole image reads as a meditation on memory, longing, and forgetting.
foreground: kneeling robed figure drinking from cupped hands at the edge of still water
background: misty plain with distant ghostly riders on horseback fading into haze
